schema.description: Defines the configuration of workflow task reminders after task due date, including email, notification, etc.

id.description: Unique identifier of the reminder configuration

relative.description: Set reminder time (0 for at the due date, -1 for before the due date, 1 for after the due date)

value.description: Set the offset value for the reminder time, e.g., 1 means remind 1 day later (when relative=1 or -1)

type.description: Set the offset type for the reminder time (when relative=1 or -1)

from.description: Configure sender: -1 for system default sender, 0 for Yeeflow mail service (when actiontype=0)

subject.description: Reminder subject (email subject/notification title), supports HTML and dynamic expressions (when actiontype=0)

content.description: If actiontype=1, values are Approved, Rejected (tasktype=complete, only Completed). If actiontype=0, reminder content is email body, supports HTML and dynamic expressions

properties.description: The URL of the task form that is generated or initiated from a task list or workflow item.
The type of task to be performed. If set to 'approve', 'Approve' and 'Reject' buttons will be displayed. If set to 'complete', a 'Complete' button will be displayed.

enumValues.label: The task has a due date in hours.
The task has an express completion date.
The task has a due date on a specific day.
The task has a due date on a specific minute.

properties.description: Specifies the due date type for the task.

Specifies the due date for the task. The format depends on the due date type. (When properties.duedatetype is hour, day, or minute). Important: This value is descriptive and does not support logic-based conditional checks for completion status.
Specifies the express completion date for the task by a rich text editor. (When properties.duedatetype is express)
Specifies whether the express completion date is from the work calendar. (When properties.duedatetype is day)
Specifies whether to disable quick approval.if false, the workflow task will allow direct task processing in notification message cards.
Specifies whether the task is sequential. If set to true, the task is completed in sequence. If set to false, the task is completed in parallel. DEFAULT is false.
Specifies whether the task is reassignable. If set to true, the task can be reassigned to another user. If set to false, the task cannot be reassigned. DEFAULT is false.
Specifies whether the task is signable. If set to true, the task can be signed by the assignee. If set to false, the task cannot be signed. DEFAULT is false.

enumValues.label: All approvers must approve the task(DEFAULT).
First Decision – Take the first approver's decision as the task final result (when properties.tasktype is approve)
Any one rejects the task (when properties.tasktype is approve)
Custom percentage – Set the percentage of approvers to approve the task.

properties.description: Specifies whether the task is commentable. If set to true, the task can be commented on. If set to false, the task cannot be commented on.
Set the percentage of approvers to approve the task.Number 0-100 (when properties.approveway is custompercentage)
Specifies whether the task is skippable. If set to false, the task can be skipped. If set to true, the task cannot be skipped.
If set to true, automatically approve the current task when the approver is the applicant or has approved the previous task.
appliesWhen: the approver is the applicant or has approved the previous task

properties.description: Specifies whether the task is recallable.
